Test Scenarios: US10. As a coach I can book a session for a client via "Book Session" CTA
Open Book a session popup via CTA button — defaults
Step:
1. Navigate to Calendar page with Booking feature enabled.
2. Click the "Book a session" CTA button.
3. Verify the "Book a session" popup.
Test Data:
Logged in as Owner/Admin.
Booking feature enabled for Workspace.
Expected:
- "Book a session" popup opens.
- Background calendar is dimmed.
- Focus is trapped inside the modal.
- Popup contains fields: Trainer (disabled), Client, Start Date, Start Time, Type, Name, Duration, Location, Add note to client, and CTA buttons: "Book Session" | "Cancel" + Close icon.
- Trainer field is disabled and defaults to Workspace's Owner.
- Start Date defaults to today.
- Start Time defaults to 7:00 AM.
- Location defaults to "In-person".
- Duration is auto-populated with 30 min.

Test Scenarios: Open Book a session popup via time slot click — Day/Week view prefill
Step:
1. Navigate to Calendar page on Day view.
2. Click a time slot (e.g., 6 AM–7 AM row).
3. Verify the "Book a session" popup.
4. Switch to Week view; click a different time slot.
5. Verify the popup again.
Test Data:
Booking feature enabled.
Day view and Week view active.
Expected:
- Popup opens on both views.
- Start Date = clicked date.
- Start Time = start hour of the clicked time slot (e.g., 6:00 AM).
- Other defaults remain (Location = In-person, Duration = 30 min).

Test Scenarios: Open Book a session popup via time slot click — Month view prefill
Step:

2. Click a date cell.
3. Verify the "Book a session" popup.
Test Data:

Month view active.
Expected:
- Popup opens.
- Start Date = clicked date.
- Start Time defaults to 7:00 AM (no time slot on Month view).

Test Scenarios: Client field — dropdown display and alphabetical sort

1. Open "Book a session" popup.
2. Click the "Client" field.
3. Verify the dropdown.
4. Scroll to load more clients.
Test Data: Workspace has 25+ active clients (not Pending / Archived / Waiting Activation).
Expected:
- Dropdown opens with a searchable input and hover state on items.
- First 20 clients are loaded sorted alphabetically by name.
- Scrolling loads the next batch of clients.
- Each client item shows: profile image, client name, client email.
- Clients at Pending / Archived / Waiting Activation status are not shown.

Test Scenarios: Client field — search by name and email; no results state
Step:
1. Open "Book a session" popup.
2. Click the "Client" field.
3. Type a partial client name; wait 200 ms.
4. Verify filtered results.
5. Clear the input; type a client email; wait 200 ms.
6. Verify filtered results.
7. Type a string that matches no client; wait 200 ms.
8. Verify empty state.
Test Data:
Active clients exist.
Search string that matches by name; search string that matches by email; search string matching nothing.
Expected:
- After 200 ms debounce, dropdown shows only matching clients for name search.
- After 200 ms debounce, dropdown shows only matching clients for email search.
- When no match, dropdown shows message: "No clients found."
- Selecting a client closes the dropdown.

Test Scenarios: Start Date field — keyboard input and calendar picker
Step:
1. Open "Book a session" popup.
2. Click the "Start date" field.
3. Verify field behavior on focus.
4. Type a valid date (e.g., "Mar 15, 2026"); verify calendar hover.
5. Press Enter; verify value applied and picker closed.
6. Reopen picker; hover a date out of supported range; verify cursor icon.
Test Data:
Current date = today.
WS created at least 1 year ago.
Expected:
- Clicking the field highlights the entire current value.
- Calendar picker opens.
- As mmm is typed, calendar hovers on the 1st of that month in current year.
- As dd is typed, calendar hovers on that date in the selected month.
- As yyyy is typed, calendar hovers on the complete date in the selected year.
- Pressing Enter or clicking outside applies the typed value and closes the picker.
- Currently selected date is visually highlighted in the picker.
- Hovering a date outside the supported range (WS creation date to 1 year ahead) shows a "stop" icon.

Test Scenarios: Book validation — required fields empty on submit

4. Verify validation.

Test Scenarios: Successful booking — no overlap; future session; calendar navigation
Step:
1. Open "Book a session" popup.
2. Fill in all required fields with a future date/time (no overlapping session).
3. Click "Book Session".
4. Verify outcome.
Test Data:
All required fields filled.
Session end time is in the future (>= current time).
No existing session overlaps with the new session's time slot.
Expected:
- Popup closes.
- Toast message displays: "The session has been added" / "Session has been scheduled.".
- New session is visible on the calendar, positioned at the correct start time.
- Calendar navigates to the week/date containing the new session if it is outside the current view.

Test Scenarios: Book with overlap — Overlap confirmation popup and Book Anyway
Step:
1. Create an existing future session (e.g., 10:00–11:00 AM today).
2. Open "Book a session" popup; fill fields with overlapping time (e.g., 10:30–11:30 AM today).
3. Click "Book Session".
4. Verify Overlap popup.
5. Click "Book Anyway".
6. Verify outcome.
Test Data:
Existing future session: 10:00–11:00 AM today.
New session: 10:30 AM, 60 min duration, same trainer.
Expected:
- "Session Overlap" confirmation popup appears.
- Description: "You already have another session during this time. Are you sure you want to book this session anyway?"
- Buttons: "Cancel" (unfocused), "Book Anyway" (focused).
- Clicking "Book Anyway" saves the session (same as no-overlap flow: popup closes, toast shown, session on calendar).

Test Scenarios: Book with overlap — Cancel returns to Book popup with data intact
Step:

2. Click "Book Session"; verify Overlap popup appears.
3. Click "Cancel" on the Overlap popup.
4. Verify state.
Test Data: Overlapping future session exists.
Expected:
- Overlap confirmation popup closes.
- "Book a session" popup is displayed again.
- All previously entered data (client, date, time, etc.) is preserved.

Test Scenarios: Book with overlap — X icon on Overlap popup returns to Book popup

3. Click the "x" icon on the Overlap popup.
4. Verify state.
Test Data: Overlapping future session exists.
Expected:

- "Session Date Is In the Past" popup appears.
- Message: "You selected a Date and time that is in the past. This session will be saved as Completed. No client communication will be sent. Are you sure you want to book this session anyway?"
- Buttons: "Cancel", "Book Anyway" (focused).
- Clicking "Book Anyway" saves the session; popup closes; toast shown; session appears on calendar.

2. Enter data in at least one field.

Test Scenarios: Day view — session block height for sessions ≤15 min and >15 min tiers
Step:
1. Navigate to Calendar page in Day view.
2. Create sessions of: 15 min, 20 min, 30 min, 45 min, 50 min, 60 min, 90 min.
3. Verify block heights and content display for each.
Test Data: Sessions created: 15 min, 20 min, 30 min, 45 min, 50 min, 60 min, 90 min.
Expected:
- 15-min session: block height = 1/4 of 1-hour slot (fixed); info in 1 line (client name, start time, session name).
- 20-min and 30-min and 45-min sessions: height = duration/60; info in 1 line.
- 50-min session (>45 min, <60 min): info in 2 lines — Line 1: client name + start time; Line 2: session name.
- 60-min and 90-min sessions (>=60 min): info in 3 lines — Line 1: client name; Line 2: start–end time; Line 3: session name.
- Each session starts exactly at its corresponding time slot on the grid.

5. Verify time display.
Test Data:
Sessions with >=60 min duration (3-line display).
Session A: 10:00–11:00 AM.
Session B: 11:30 AM–12:30 PM.
Expected:
- Same am/pm: Line 2 displays "10:00 AM – 11:00 AM" (am/pm shown on both).
- Different am/pm: Line 2 displays "11:30 AM – 12:30 PM" (only end time shows PM).
